name: Al Murray
bio: Al Murray is an English comedian best known for his stage persona The Pub Landlord, a bombastic, conservative English publican. He developed the character through the 1990s and won the Perrier Award at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe in 1999 after three earlier nominations. The character led to television shows including Time Gentlemen Please and the chat show Al Murrays Happy Hour.

timeline.ev: Wins the Perrier Award at the Edinburgh Fringe
Sitcom Time Gentlemen Please begins on Sky One
Al Murrays Happy Hour wins a British Comedy Award
Barrel of Fun tour filmed at the Hammersmith Apollo

accolades: British Comedy Award for Al Murrays Happy Hour (2007)
Laurence Olivier Award nomination, My Gaff My Rules (2002)

bits.yt_title: Al Murray on brain power - Live at the Apollo - BBC
